test-method.name: tc_login_01_validCredentials_shouldReachCatalog
test-method.description: Valid credentials should navigate to the product catalog

test-method.name: tc_login_02_invalidCredentials_shouldShowError
test-method.description: Invalid credentials should show an error message

test-method.name: tc_login_03_emptyCredentials_shouldShowError
test-method.description: Empty credentials should show an error message

test-method.name: tc_checkout_01_fullPurchaseFlow_shouldShowConfirmation
test-method.description: Full flow: browse catalog → add to cart → checkout → confirmation

test-method.name: tc_checkout_02_addToCart_badgeShouldIncrement
test-method.description: Cart badge count should increment when a product is added

test-method.name: tc_checkout_03_cartPersistsAfterBackground
test-method.description: Cart items should persist after the app is backgrounded and restored

test-method.name: tc_state_01_cartPersistsAfterRestart
test-method.description: Cart items should persist after a full app restart

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by AppiumBy.androidUIAutomator: new UiSelector().resourceId("com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android:id/productTV") (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.3' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Capabilities {appium:app: C:\Users\agoda\Downloads\mo..., appium:appActivity: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.and..., appium:appPackage: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.and..., appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:databaseEnabled: false, appium:desired: {app: C:\Users\agoda\Downloads\mo..., appActivity: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.and..., appPackage: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.and..., autoGrantPermissions: true, automationName: UiAutomator2, deviceName: Galaxy, fullReset: false, newCommandTimeout: 240, noReset: false, platformName: android, platformVersion: 14}, appium:deviceApiLevel: 34, appium:deviceManufacturer: samsung, appium:deviceModel: SM-A528B, appium:deviceName: R5CR932TQ4Y, appium:deviceScreenDensity: 450, appium:deviceScreenSize: 1080x2400, appium:deviceUDID: R5CR932TQ4Y, appium:fullReset: false, appium:javascriptEnabled: true, appium:locationContextEnabled: false, appium:networkConnectionEnabled: true, appium:newCommandTimeout: 240, appium:noReset: false, appium:pixelRatio: 2.8125, appium:platformVersion: 14, appium:statBarHeight: 87, appium:takesScreenshot: true, appium:viewportRect: {height: 2313, left: 0, top: 87, width: 1080}, appium:warnings: {}, appium:webStorageEnabled: false, platformName: ANDROID} Session ID: d4e61c6e-be32-4847-aa1a-6b2b909a7754

test-method.name: tc_state_02_sessionClearedAfterFullReset
test-method.description: User should be logged out after a full app data reset
